title: Modular Drones
description: Build a custom drone to follow you around and help you out.
body:
Build your own personal drone out of regular Minecraft blocks, then shrink it down and carry it as a small item. Equip it, and your drone hovers alongside you — fighting off enemies, mining next to you, collecting dropped loot, lighting up dark caves, and more.

![Player standing next to a drone on an assembly platform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qJXeXOKx/images/3fe34e047ddcdbe084e50b220339879c9b171ebc.png)

The blocks you use determine what your drone can do. Rotors keep it in the air. A dispenser gives it ranged attacks. A beacon unleashes a powerful beam. A magnetic lodestone makes it a tireless loot collector. Stack abilities to build a companion that fits the way you play.

Your drone can always be re-materialized for editing later if you want to change things up and perfect your design.

**[Full documentation and getting-started guide →](https://kesslercascade.github.io/modular-drones/)**

---

This is a fork of rearth's [Buddy Drones](https://github.com/rearth/Drone_Buddies), which was created for the CurseForge "The Future" modjam. This project has since taken on its own direction with new features, balance changes, and improvements. See the documentation site for the full changelog.
